title: Ben Currie
description: England and Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Ben Currie (born 15 July 1994) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row or centre for the Warrington Wolves in the Super League. He has played for the England Knights, Ireland and England at international level.
Currie has spent time on loan from Warrington at the Swinton Lions in the Championship.
